title: ICanGamez Better Fishing
description: This adds new fishing rods, Fishes, Gear, Weapon, And much more aquatically themed! Just a boost in the fishing experience!
body:
# Better Fishing
This adds a bunch more items related to fishing! Between getting more fish for the rods or getting new rarer items that unlock more better fishing rods for better loot, this mod has great possibilities to make fishing fun!

<details>
<summary>Getting Started</summary>
So you need to craft a iron rod by circling iron around a stick!
  
Then you need to circle around a string with gold!

After That you can craft the rods and golden string into a fishing rod fasion!

Fish up more parts to make the Deepsea Fishing Rod for better loot, And again for the lurker fishing rod!
</details>


<details>
<summary>Different Rods List</summary>

This is a list of all the rods in order from worst to best for loot table drops!

Iron fishing rod

Deepsea fishing rod

Lurker fishing rod


</details>

<details>
<summary>What else does this add?</summary>

Well this mod adds a lot more than just fishing rods, its also adds

- Storage Item
- New Wood Set
- More Foods
- Fishing Hat
- Lootbags
- And More!!

</details>

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7d1d99df17fbcb5fcc3eeef4283d4403e9a90a.png) Thanks for reading!
